title: Xtra Crunchy Australian Fish Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Australian dish featuring sashimi-cut fish, vegetable shortening, and a crunchy exterior, this recipe is halal-friendly and perfect for a fun family dinner. The combination of flavors and textures is sure to delight both kids and adults.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the breadcrumbs, grated carrot, and grated zucchini.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
Add the vegetable shortening to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
Add the fish fillets to the egg mixture and coat evenly.
Roll the coated fish fillets in the breadcrumb mixture to coat.
Thread the coated fish fillets onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot and enjoy.
